name: Pecan Butter Crunch- (Heath Bar)
recipeIngredient: 8 Ounce Bakers German's Dark Sweet Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F. This recipe requires a candy thermometer.
2. Melt the butter in a pot over low heat, stirring occasionally until melted.
3. Add salt and immediately stir in 1 1/2 cups (contents of one pan) pecans.
4. Pour the mixture into a foil-lined pan, using a wooden spoon to spread it evenly.
5. In the top of a double boiler over simmering water, melt the chocolate.
6. Combine the melted chocolate with the pecan butter mixture and stir until well combined.
7. Allow the mixture to cool completely before removing from the foil-lined pan.
8. This recipe can be made up to two months in advance and is suitable for making large quantities of gifts that can travel well.
